other_observers: 20 plus, including Joey Kellner, Brandon Percival, and Glenn Walbek.; Robb Hinds photographed the bird on 10/19/2012.
duration: Several good views totaling about a minute and a half.
specific_location: Upper twin pond at Chico Basin Ranch.
description: A medium sized sparrow. Bright, thick orange eyeline and malar region continuing round to the area behind ear. This orange completely surrounded a gray auricular patch. The median crown stripe was gray, and the back of the neck was gray and unstreaked. The upper breast was orange with streaks, and a very sharp dividing line between the upper breast and the very white breast and underparts. The flanks were also streaked orange. The back was darkish brown, but with two bright white streaks running down the upper back on each side. The wing coverts were dark, but noticeably edged with orange. The eye was dark with a light, thin eyering. The bill was average sized and light, and the legs were light.Behaviors: Flitting around in quite tall marsh plants at the edge of a small pond.Call: None heard.Plumage: Alternate
